things.name: Spodek Arena
things.description: Futuristic 1970s flying saucer-shaped arena and the iconic symbol of Katowice

things.name: Silesian Museum
things.description: One of the largest museums in Poland housed in a former mine with underground galleries

things.name: NOSPR Concert Hall
things.description: World-acclaimed concert hall of the National Polish Radio Symphony Orchestra

things.name: Nikiszowiec
things.description: Remarkably preserved 1908 red-brick mining district, a UNESCO candidate

things.name: Silesian Park
things.description: Poland's largest urban park with an amusement park, planetarium and Rose Garden

things.name: Silesian Planetarium
things.description: Historic 1950s Carl Zeiss planetarium in Chorzow within Silesian Park

things.name: Guido Coal Mine
things.description: 19th-century mine in Zabrze where visitors can descend 320 metres underground

things.name: Museum of Silesia
things.description: Regional history and ethnography museum in a baroque Silesian residence

things.name: Mariacka Street
things.description: Katowice's most charming pedestrian street with Gothic Revival buildings

things.name: International Centre of the Book
things.description: Magnificent 1990s palace of books and culture in a striking industrial complex
